channel.title: Tags on еҗ‘еҸ”гҒ®жүӢеёі
channel.description: Recent content in Tags on еҗ‘еҸ”гҒ®жүӢеёі

item.title:
жӮӘйӯ” (Akumashi) вҖ“ This Is the Most Common and Appropriate Translation, Conveying the Sense of a "Rogue" or "Scoundrel."
Alternatively, Depending on Context, You Could Use:
* и©җж¬әеё« (Sagi Shi) - Swindler * з„Ўжі•иҖ… (Fubasha) - Outlaw/Bandit

еӣҪж…¶ (GuГіqГ¬ng) вҖ“ This Refers to the National Day of China. a More Natural Translation Would Be:
еӣҪж…¶зҜҖ (GuГіqГ¬ngjiГ©) - National Day (Holiday)
